who: payroll administrators in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month
offer: For payroll administrators in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, inaccurate tracking of overtime hours causes payroll errors. We provide alerts instead of manual tracking and spreadsheets.
problem: Tracking employee overtime hours accurately and timely.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for payroll administrators
Indie Hackers posts on payroll workflows
DM outreach to payroll administrators with demo video
Community forums for payroll administrators sharing tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of overtime hours and alerts
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Short demo video of manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
